series_metadata.series_title: General Requisition Purchase Orders and Contract Encumbrances
series_metadata.series_description: Requisition orders and encumbrances for goods and services by a state agency from a specified outside vendor or a state or local government entity. These are official agency copies maintained in the Fiscal Office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year in operating area and 14 years off site, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
